title: Billy's Inside Story: Final Commercial
description:
My Twitter: https://twitter.com/_AxelRude
I stream at: https://mixer.com/axelrod777

Now that this beast of a project is out of the way I can finish my soccers.

To try to be at least somewhat original, I didn't use Big City Slider Station. Also that's the Spanish Slap Chop commercial.

Song: Mario & Luigi: Bowser's Inside Story Final Boss Theme
